creator: lippemail@gmail.com
text:
Hi Alexey,

As noticed by you per mail, please consider to send an patch to upgrade
it to 0.8.2.2, and yes, you can send it changing MAINTAINER. If the
current maintainer not reply nothing until 2 weeks, we'll give this
port to you.

I can wait an new patch ?

Thanks!

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
